description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named JPL Coding Standard Scan that runs on push to master and devel branches and on pull requests to those branches. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions and contents and write permission for security events. Perform a CodeQL analysis in a matrix of jobs for the cpp language and multiple config files, including checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL, building with a Python virtual environment, and running the CodeQL analysis.
